target: 1. Hit Me, Huh?
July 22nd

I'm sorry…
I just left Tokyo on my own…

Me too…
I'm sorry. I couldn't see you off…

Ah, sister…
Hit me, huh?
Well, it's okay.

Shinpei and sister being friendly…
That'd be better…
(Actually… That might be better…)

(Seeing those two now makes me happy.
There's no lie or pretense in that feeling)

(But… Why?
I also have a feeling I can't be genuinely happy…)
…From dad?

Ah, Mio.
How's things there?

Shinpei just suddenly ran off, right?
I was worried…

Ah, it's okay.
I caught up properly.
I'm already talking with sister.

Oh!
Then that's good.

Sorry, I left the shop open.
I'll be back soon.

You should hurry.
You wanted to talk to Shinpei, right?

It's been a while, so
Mio, you should talk properly.

Well, it's not like it's a big deal.
I didn't leave the shop to talk to you.

Haha.
Oh right.
Today Shinpei's parents are out, right?
Yeah, they went to Osaka for work.
Since it's a chance, Shinpei can eat dinner with us.
That's good!
If you want, tell Shinpei to stay over.

Yeah, I'll remember to tell him!
Thanks, dad!

Staying over at our place…
It feels like old times.

What are the sisters talking about?
They're too close…
Haha, I'll go interrupt them.

Ugh!
You were sneaking a look, that's bad taste.

You said you'd definitely hit me,
but you're getting along so well…

That's what I'm saying!
It's different!
Hey, Shinpei!

Eh…?
Ah, right…

I don't know how to say it,
but the two of them had a strange dream.

Eh…? Dream?
How could two people have the same dream?

I guess it's not normal,
but…
Even if you say that, I don't get it.
I don't get it either…

Ah…
I'm not lying.
Hah…
Mio, you're acting weird today.

Yeah, I'll admit it.
I feel a bit strange myself.

But, my head isn't hurting,
and I don't feel sick, so you can relax.

Is that so?
Then that's good.

Well, I'm not sick, but being strange…
That's also a problem, right?

So don't worry about it!
You're being too picky.

Anyway, Shinpei,
Dad said you can stay over.
Huh? Really?

If sister says it's okay,
then it's okay, right?

Huh!?
Why is it my decision!?

Because earlier,
you said you wouldn't let me step over the threshold again,
didn't you?
Ugh…
I-I'll forgive you if you cook dinner for me today!

Ah, that's easy.
Would you like curry?

Of course!
You really know me, Shinpei!
Well, I was going to make you curry anyway.

Great!
It's been two years since I last had Shinpei's curry!
Then I'll tell dad that.
Huh? Shinpei, what's wrong?
Ah, nothing at all.

Curry!
Curry Curry!
Currrrry!

Okay, okay.
I'll make it, so sit down.

Since I made you wait so long,
I'll make it extra good.
I'm looking forward to it, Shinpei!
Sister's so excited…

Of course!
It's been two years!

Haha… 
If this continues, I should make more.

He's growing, you know.
Make it extra big!

Then I'll make it extra big for you, and even bigger for her.
What about you, Mio?

…Mio?
What's wrong?
N-Nothing…

It's fine, really.
I don't eat as much as sister.

Mio, what's wrong?
You really are acting weird.

Eh?
I'm fine, really.
I'm looking forward to Shinpei's curry!

Ah, right.
Shinpei, if you want…
Shinpei, help out?
Ah…

It's fine.
I told you to sit down.

What's with that attitude!?
I tried to help, but you don't even look happy!
I'm not saying that, but can you really help?
Ah!?

Shinpei, are you challenging me?
I'll show you my elegant knife skills!

Wait, I got it!
I'll teach you, so don't touch the knife!
Hmph, if you understand, that's fine.

So?
What should I do?

Well… For now,
peel the potatoes.
Ah, leave it to me!

Shinpei, this part that looks like a sprout,
how do I cut it?

There's a bump on the side of the peeler, right?
Use that.

This one?
I'll try!
Hmph…!

Eh, it's so hard!
I can't do it at all…

Hey, be careful!
You'll get hurt if you slip.

I know!
Nuh… nuh… nuh…!

Ah, I can't watch anymore!
Give it to me, I'll do it!

No way!
You should do your own stuff!

Hey!
I'm saying that because I care!
That's none of your business!
…Haha.

(Oh, I wanted to help too,
but I ended up outside…)

(Well, it's fun watching the two of them.
If I can eat delicious curry,
that's also fine…)
Phew…
Hey, Mio?
Huh? What?

You don't look tired?
You can rest in the room.

I-I'm fine!
It's nothing!
You've been stressed because Shinpei didn't come back.

I'll hit you once!
I'll forgive you!
Eh~…

…You say that,
but you didn't hit me.

I-I didn't say that!
I'll hit you after the curry!

Why!?
I said I was sorry this morning!
I'll apologize later, so let's put that aside for now!

…taku.
You really haven't changed, you know.
(Hmm… they get along well)

…Ah.
Sorry, I need to take a call.
Ah, right.
Hello?
Ah, Mio? Sorry for calling so late.
Mio, who's calling?
You're supposed to be quiet during the call.
Tokiko? What's wrong?
Ah, Tokiko-chan!
I said be quiet!
I'm sorry, but can you come out for a bit? I want to talk.
Talk about…? Ah… wait a moment.
Shin-chan, sister. Since Tokiko called, can I go out for a bit?
Tokiko-chan? What's the matter?
I don't know… Ah, save my curry.
Ah, of course. Be careful not to be late.
Yeah, thanks. I'll save the curry for later. Be good while I'm gone.
S-so, how about that! Shinpei has the talent to make me angry!
Well, don't worry. We'll handle it here.
Yeah, I'm going.
(Honestly, I'm not worried at all…)
